corrections.text: The article states 'The v1.12.x release series is supported until February 1, 2027, per the project's changelog' and attributes this to the GitHub release page (github.com/opentofu/opentofu/releases/tag/v1.12.0). The captured snapshot of that page does not contain this date or support-lifecycle information. The claim may be accurate based on information available elsewhere in OpenTofu's documentation (e.g., a security policy or support matrix page), but it cannot be verified from the cited source.
